# Horizon Haulers

> Horizon Haulers provides premium back-office support for trucking companies — dispatching, DOT compliance, safety audits, and admin tools so owner-operators can focus on the road.

## Pages

- [/](/): Home — learn about our services, tools, and why fleets choose Horizon Haulers.
- [/privacy](/privacy): Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, and protect your data.
- [/terms](/terms): Terms of Service — terms and conditions for using our platform.
- [/sitemap.xml](/sitemap.xml): Sitemap — list of all pages for search engines.

## Services

- **Dispatching**: 24/7 load booking, rate negotiation, and route optimization.
- **Back Office**: Invoicing, factoring, IFTA reporting, and document management.
- **DOT Compliance**: Authority setup, insurance filings, and compliance monitoring.
- **Safety Audits**: Driver qualification files and safety performance tracking.

## Tools

- **Deadhead Calculator**: Estimate empty-mile costs and find backhaul loads.
- **Cost Per Mile**: Calculate true operating costs per mile for your fleet.
- **IFTA Estimator**: Simplify fuel tax reporting across jurisdictions.
- **Invoice Generator**: Create professional freight invoices instantly.

## Contact

- Phone: [(307) 443-6094](tel:3074436094)
- Email: info@horizonhaulers.org
- Address: Gillette, WY — serving owner-operators and fleets nationwide.

## Domain

- Primary: https://horizonhaulers.org
